Purchase options and add-ons

  • Our best sounding Echo Dot yet – Enjoy an improved audio experience compared to any previous Echo Dot with Alexa for clearer vocals, deeper bass and vibrant sound in any room.
  • Your favourite music and content – Play music, audiobooks, and podcasts from Amazon Music, Apple Music, Spotify and others or via Bluetooth throughout your home.
  • Alexa is happy to help – Ask Alexa for weather updates and to set hands-free timers, get answers to your questions and even hear jokes. Need a few extra minutes in the morning? Just tap your Echo Dot to snooze your alarm.
  • Keep your home comfortable – Control compatible smart home devices with your voice and routines triggered by built-in motion or indoor temperature sensors. Create routines to automatically turn on lights when you walk into a room, or start a fan if the inside temperature goes above your comfort zone.
  • Designed to protect your privacy – Amazon is not in the business of selling your personal information to others. Built with multiple layers of privacy controls, including a mic off button.
  • Do more with device pairing – Fill your home with music using compatible Echo devices in different rooms, create a home theatre system with Fire TV, or extend wifi coverage with a compatible eero network so you can say goodbye to drop-offs and buffering.
› See more product details
Report an issue with this product

We want you to know

  • It is necessary to have a Prime membership or a subscription to the Alexa+ Standard plan to use Alexa+ on compatible devices.

  • Alexa+ requires a Canada-based Amazon account and compatible devices set to Canadian English or French. Setup details available here.

We want you to know

  • After Early Access, Alexa+ will be free with your Prime membership or available to non-Prime customers for $27.99/month. The original Alexa continues to be included with all Alexa enabled devices.
  • Alexa+ Early Access requires a personal, Canada-based Amazon account with English Canada language set on all compatible Alexa+ devices. When you purchase this device, access to Alexa+ will be granted on the Amazon account you use for setup (used devices excluded). Learn more about device requirements.
  • Alexa+ is currently only available in English in Canada.

Alexa+ is free with Prime

To help you with whatever you need, Echo devices are designed for our smartest AI assistant yet—from meal planning to booking reservations, deal-finding, home management, and everything in between. Full access to Alexa+ on compatible devices is included for free with a Prime membership.

Previous page

  1. Easy to talk to

    Talk naturally, flow freely between topics, and ask about anything you like.

  2. Gets more done

    Alexa works for you with connected services and easier access to Prime benefits.

  3. Tailored to you

    Alexa+ offers personalized entertainment, deal tracking, and household management.

  4. Ready where you are

    On Alexa.com, in the Alexa app, and, for Prime members, across all compatible devices.

Next page

Get full access to Alexa+ across compatible devices, Alexa.com, and the Alexa app free with Prime membership. For non-Prime customers, the Alexa+ Standard plan is $27.99/month + tax. Learn more.

Small size, big possibilities

Our most popular smart speaker features a sleek design and improved audio for vibrant sound anywhere in your home. With Echo Dot, you can stay on track with help from Alexa, control compatible smart home devices and start routines with your motion.

Vibrant
Sound

Timers

Motion
Detection

Information

Privacy
Controls

Temperature
Sensor

Our best-sounding
Echo Dot yet




Echo Dot features improved speaker quality, delivering clearer vocals and deeper bass for rich vibrant sound. Just ask Alexa to play music, podcasts, and audiobooks and enjoy a dynamic audio experience anywhere in your home. Learn more about Alexa Entertainment.

Alexa is happy to help

Make your life easier at home. Alexa is ready to help throughout the day with weather and news updates, hands-free timers and reminders, answers to your questions, and can even tell you jokes.

Help keep your home comfortable

“Alexa, turn on living room light.”

Light
Bulb

Smart
Plug

Lock

Thermostat

Fan

Wifi

Start Routines with your motion

Paired with compatible light bulbs, thermostats, and more, Echo Dot lets you control your smart home using your voice, motion or indoor temperature. Create routines to turn on lights or play music at a scheduled time or when you walk into a room.

Tap to pause music or
snooze alarms

With a simple tap you can pause a song, end a call, or stop a timer. Need a few extra minutes of sleep? Just tap to snooze.

Alexa and Echo devices are built with multiple layers of privacy protection.

Do more with device pairing

Echo Dot + another Echo

Fill your home with music using compatible Echo devices in different rooms.

Echo Dot + Fire TV

Watch TV with immersive sound when you set up Alexa Home Theater with compatible devices. Learn more about Alexa Home Theater.

Echo Dot + eero wifi router

Extend your wifi coverage and say goodbye to drop-offs and buffering with eero Built-in on a compatible eero network. Learn more about eero Built-in.

Simple to set up and use

Step 1

Plug in Echo Dot.

Step 2

Connect to the internet
with the Alexa app.

Step 3

Ask Alexa for music,
weather, news, and more.

Every day is an earth day

You don't have to be an environmental scientist to make sustainable choices. We considered sustainability in the design of this device. Here's how:

Materials

55% post-consumer recycled plastics
100% post-consumer recycled polyester yarn
Device, cable and adapter included.

Clean Energy

Amazon is building new wind and solar farms to produce clean energy equivalent to the electricity used by this device.

Device Packaging

99% of this device’s packaging is made of wood fiber-based materials from responsibly managed forests or recycled sources.

Part With Purpose

There may come a time when you want to trade in or recycle your device. Explore options with Amazon Second Chance.

Low Power Mode

To reduce its energy consumption, this device will enter Low Power Mode when it is idle. Low Power Mode is not available for certain user configurations. To learn more, see Low Power Mode Restrictions.

Technical Details

Echo Dot (Newest Model)

Size

100 mm x 100 mm x 89 mm

Weight

304g Actual size and weight may vary by manufacturing process

Audio Bandwidth

62 Hz - 19 kHz (volume 6)

Loudspeaker Driver Dimensions

1.6” full range driver

Playback Channels

Mono

Audio Signal Processing Technology

N/A

Wi-Fi connectivity

Dual-band wifi supports 802.11a/b/g/n/ac (2.4 and 5 GHz) networks. Does not support connecting to ad-hoc (or peer-to-peer) wifi networks.

Smart Home Device Compatibility

WiFi, Bluetooth Low Energy Mesh, and Matter.

Amazon Sidewalk

Sidewalk uses Echo and Ring devices to securely keep other devices connected and can help find lost items by reporting their approximate location to the owner. Sidewalk can enable supported devices to remain connected even when wifi is lost or the supported devices are outside the range of their home wifi. Sidewalk uses a small portion of your internet bandwidth and the approximate location of your devices to provide these benefits to you and your neighbours. Sidewalk is turned on for your device unless you have previously turned it off. You can turn off Sidewalk at any time in Account Settings in the Alexa app.

Bluetooth connectivity

Advanced Audio Distribution Profile (A2DP) support for audio streaming from your mobile device to Echo Dot or from Echo Dot to your Bluetooth speaker. Audio/Video Remote Control Profile (AVRCP) for voice control of connected mobile devices. Hands-free voice control is not supported for Mac OS X devices. Bluetooth speakers requiring PIN codes are not supported.

eero Built-in

Your wifi network must use a compatible eero router and your Echo device must stay in range of a compatible eero device. You will need to link your eero and Amazon accounts and manage eero Built-in from the eero mobile application to use this feature. eero Built-in compatible Echo devices support up to 1,000 sq. ft. of additional coverage, speeds up to 100 Mb/s and 10 or fewer connected devices in the 5 GHz band. Actual performance can vary and certain eero, Echo, or Alexa features may be incompatible with eero Built-in. Learn more about eero Built-in performance, availability and compatibility. Use of eero and eero-related products and services, including eero Built-in, requires creation of an eero account and agreement to eero’s Terms of Service. Review eero’s Privacy Notice.

System requirements

Echo Dot comes ready to connect to your wifi. The Alexa app is compatible with Fire OS, Android, and iOS devices and also accessible via your web browser. Supported operating systems. Certain skills and services may require subscription or other fees.

Setup technology

Amazon wifi simple setup enables customers to connect smart devices to their wifi network in a few easy steps. Wi-Fi simple setup is another way Alexa is always getting smarter. Learn more about wifi simple setup.

Warranty and service

1-year limited warranty and service. Use of Echo Dot is subject to these terms.

Accessibility features

To enable features that personalize Alexa to your abilities, go to Settings → Accessibility in the Alexa App.
• Preferred Speaking Rate allows customers to control how fast or slow Alexa speaks. To enable, say “Alexa, speak slower” or “Alexa, speak faster.“
• Request Sound will play an audible tone in addition to the visual indicator when you speak to Alexa. To enable, say “Alexa, turn on Start of Request Sound.”
• Kindle Read Aloud will have Alexa read your Kindle books aloud.
• Alexa Accessibility features also include several other settings for customers with accessibility needs related to vision, hearing, mobility, and speech.

Included in the box

Echo Dot, glacier white power adapter (15W), and Quick Start Guide.

Generation

Echo Dot (5th Gen) - 2022 release

Privacy features

Wake word technology, streaming indicators, microphone off button, the ability to view and delete your voice recordings, and more. Visit the Alexa Privacy Hub to explore how Alexa and Echo devices are designed to protect your privacy.

Language

Alexa speaks English and French

Alexa Skills & Features

Alexa makes your life easier, more meaningful, and more fun by letting you voice control your world. Alexa can help you get more out of the things you already love and discover new possibilities you've never imagined. Discover and learn what Alexa can do.

Software Security Updates

Learn more about these software security updates. If you already own an Amazon Echo, visit Manage Your Content and Devices for information specific to your device.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzes reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Customers say

The Echo Dot delivers very good sound quality and works well as a smart device. Customers find it easy to set up and use, describing it as very intuitive. The device functions as a powerhouse of functionality and provides convenient music playback with satisfactory music quality. However, customers have different opinions on connectivity.
AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

Customers find the Echo Dot delivers very good sound quality.
"...Echo Dot has the amazing alexa assistant and all of her features, great sound, touch controls, tempature sensing, and is great value if you get in..." Read more

"...The sound is great and I love that I can listen to my favorite song, playlist, or radio station on command. It would make a great gift!..." Read more
612 customers mention reliability, 430 positive, 182 negative612 customers mention "Reliability"430 positive182 negative
Customers find the Echo Dot works well and serves as a powerhouse of functionality. It works effectively for busy families and handles day-to-day questions well. The firestick works fantastic on its own, though some mention Google Home works better for certain tasks.
"I can't believe I lived this long without buying myself an ECHO. It works great. Easy to set up. Picks up my voice without any issue...." Read more
"...Nice upgrade for the echo dot. Love the blue colour. Works well, hears well. Good sound. Bought it to use in the bathroom. Great overall Alexa device." Read more
"stopped working thats why i have to return it hi" Read more
"...Also use drop in to the different buildings on property. Works very well. Currently have echo show and 3 echo dots...." Read more
609 customers mention spunk, 531 positive, 78 negative609 customers mention "Spunk"531 positive78 negative
Customers find the Echo Dot to be an awesome and nice smart device. They describe it as the best little AI and a great little smart speaker. Users consider it better than the old Echo Dot puck and praise the Alexa functionality.
"Great product just like the other Echo Dots I have around the house. User tip, adjust the base and treble levels through the App to get the best sound" Read more
"In theory this is a good product. For other users it might again be a good product...." Read more
"Great device. Works well. No problem. Only thing is that I ordered the black version and double validated on my order, and received the white one...." Read more
"This is an excellent product I have it on day and night best thing ever love it." Read more
361 customers mention music setup, 308 positive, 53 negative361 customers mention "Music setup"308 positive53 negative
Customers find the Echo Dot's music setup straightforward and user-friendly. They describe it as easy to set up and use, very intuitive, and note that setting up Alexa is a breeze.
"...It's easy to use and convenient when I'm in the kitchen and need to add something to the grocery list so I don't forget...." Read more
"I just love this product. It was easy to set up and I love that I can walk into my kitchen everyday and ask Alexa to play my favourite music with..." Read more
"Works like a charm! Easy set up. Inconspicuous and works beautifully on instruction. Clear sound. Happy to have it!" Read more
"Design is cute music playback is awesome very easy to use and the money value of it is worth it I would recommend it 100% made my life a lot easier..." Read more
145 customers mention convenience, 141 positive, 4 negative145 customers mention "Convenience"141 positive4 negative
Customers find the Echo Dot very convenient and practical for daily use. They describe it as handy and helpful, noting its usefulness for various tasks and its practicality as a lazy person's assistant.
"Pretty good, connecting Spotify and other apps is very useful and cool. But sometimes Alexa is not understanding the things you asking her." Read more
"The product is amazing and useful. It works well and we are satisfied with the product." Read more
"We have 6 in the house now they are very handy and turn on and off about 15 or more things in the house and reminding us about many things...." Read more
"...The Echo Dot was intended to be a convenient, compact, inexpensive smart speaker … If you’re looking for better sound for music and streaming..." Read more
116 customers mention music playback, 99 positive, 17 negative116 customers mention "Music playback"99 positive17 negative
The Echo Dot plays music and allows users to listen to their music library. Customers can request music and select the music they want to hear. The device plays various music and podcasts, and users appreciate the music Alexa plays.
"...We turn on and off room lamp right, play music, radio, ask it questions, turn off and on TV, set up appointments, reminders, lists, make calls and..." Read more
"How did I live without this before? 5 Stars all the way. Plays music, games, controls for your lights, TV, daily notifications, weather, plus when..." Read more
"Alexa is fantastic with good music!" Read more
"...Common uses: setting alarms, controlling lights, playing music, telling you about the weather asking, questions making grocery list, ordering..." Read more
114 customers mention music quality, 110 positive, 4 negative114 customers mention "Music quality"110 positive4 negative
Customers appreciate the music quality of this Echo Dot speaker. They describe it as an awesome speaker that delivers great music and serves as a good listener. The device works well as a perfect little speaker for bedrooms, with users noting they love the quality of the speaker.
"Great speaker and alexa help. For music I would recommend purchasing a music playing app so it finds all the songs you are requesting...." Read more
"This is a great little speaker which I’ve added to my collection of smart speakers throughout the house which I purchased on a cyber Monday sale for..." Read more
"great little Echo. it comes in handy for asking about weather, time, music. really happy for my purchase. i have one upstairs and one downstairs." Read more
"It’s a good speaker. Not perfect sound. But it’s what you’d expect for the price." Read more
272 customers mention connectivity, 136 positive, 136 negative272 customers mention "Connectivity"136 positive136 negative
Customers have mixed experiences with the Echo Dot's connectivity. Some find it connects with other Echo devices and pairs simply to anything, while others report it states it can't connect or that Apple Music won't connect at all. The device works for connecting Alexa to smart home devices, though connectivity to Spotify is described as very shotty.
"...It arrived on time, easy to hook up. The sound quality is exceptional." Read more
"Sound bandwidth too thin Stopped working with Spotify. Useless" Read more
"Perfect for a not too big space with amazing sound Easy to pair, easy to connect to various different apps or devices" Read more
"...no matter how hard I try and I have tired everything It will not connect to the internet. Extremely disappointed...." Read more

Amazon Customer
5 out of 5 stars
Easy to use, and lots of great features
This works great with my iPhone 13. It's easy to set up, and responds instantly to voice commands. It has a ton of great features, like setting alarms, and playing any kind of music on demand. And the speaker sounds great! The sound quality is quite impressive for such a small speaker. I also like how the Echo dot is small enough to put pretty much anywhere, without taking up a lot of space.

    5 out of 5 stars
    Love it! Fix Alexa +, and I'll recommend it to everyone I know.
    Reviewed in Canada on May 26, 2026
    Colour Name: CharcoalConfiguration: Device only
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    Love these things. Absolutely adore having a smarter home. Love the music, alarm, and smart home features. Great sound quality as well. Now, if they could fix Alexa +, I would upgrade back to it again, and tell everyone to buy this thing. Alexa + is exceptional on the Dot, but it never works, always loses connection, or just plain shuts down the whole system. Please fix, soon? I really loved the new Alexa.

  • Jaime Restrepo
    5 out of 5 stars
    Excellent
    Reviewed in Canada on November 9, 2025
    Colour Name: Glacier WhiteConfiguration: Device only
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    Alexa excellente, répond parfaitement à mes attentes

    J’ai acheté cet appareil Alexa et je suis vraiment satisfait. La configuration est très facile et rapide, et il reconnaît mes commandes vocales avec précision. Le son est clair et puissant pour la taille de l’enceinte, et il répond instantanément à toutes mes demandes.

    De plus, Alexa s’intègre parfaitement dans la maison : je peux contrôler les lumières, la musique, et mes appareils connectés sans problème. L’appareil est compact, élégant et fonctionne parfaitement au quotidien.

    En résumé :

    ✅ Installation simple et rapide

    ✅ Reconnaissance vocale très précise

    ✅ Son clair et puissant

    ✅ Très pratique pour la maison connectée

    Je recommande vivement cet Alexa à tous ceux qui veulent un assistant fiable et efficace à la maison.

  • Fatima Darwuish
    4 out of 5 stars
    Perfect for the bathroom, I use it every day
    Reviewed in Canada on April 15, 2026
    Colour Name: CharcoalConfiguration: Device only
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    I’ve been using this Echo Dot for over a year and I keep it in my bathroom all the time. I actually bought it for that purpose and it works really well.

    I use it to play music while I shower, and it responds well even with the sound of running water.

    The sound is good enough for a small space and it’s very convenient not having to use my phone.

    The only issue I’ve had is that it sometimes disconnects and I have to set it up again from time to time. Other than that, everything works great.

    After more than a year, it still works really well, so I definitely recommend it.

    Read moreRead less

  • Ryan
    5 out of 5 stars
    A Game Changer for a Smarter Home and Better Living!
    Reviewed in Canada on August 4, 2024
    Colour Name: CharcoalConfiguration: Device only
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    I am absolutely delighted with the Amazon Echo Dot (5th Gen). This little device has truly transformed my home and daily routine in ways I never thought possible.

    Firstly, the integration with smart home devices is seamless. I paired the Echo Dot with my smart electric bulbs, and now I can control the lighting in my home with simple voice commands. Whether I want to dim the lights for a cozy movie night or brighten up the room for reading, Alexa responds instantly. It's incredibly convenient, especially when my hands are full or I'm in another room. I no longer have to fumble for a switch or a remote; I just ask Alexa to do it for me.

    In addition to smart lighting, the Echo Dot has significantly improved my morning routine. I set up Alexa to wake me up with my favorite music or a news briefing. The sound quality is impressive for such a compact device, and it makes waking up a much more pleasant experience. I even have Alexa turn on the lights gradually in the morning, mimicking a natural sunrise, which makes waking up feel more natural and less jarring.

    Another standout feature is the voice assistant capabilities. Alexa helps me stay organized by setting reminders, timers, and alarms. She can even add items to my shopping list or calendar, which syncs with my phone, so I never forget an important task or appointment. It's like having a personal assistant available at all times.

    The Echo Dot also serves as a great entertainment hub. I can ask Alexa to play music from my favorite streaming services, listen to audiobooks, or even play games. The sound quality is surprisingly rich and full for such a small device, making it perfect for background music while working or cooking.

    Additionally, the Echo Dot's ability to answer questions, provide weather updates, and give traffic information is incredibly handy. I find myself using these features daily, and they've become an integral part of how I manage my day.

    In summary, the Amazon Echo Dot (5th Gen) is a fantastic addition to any home. Its ability to control smart devices, improve daily routines, and provide endless entertainment makes it an invaluable tool. I couldn't be happier with my purchase, and I highly recommend it to anyone looking to enhance their living space with smart technology. This little device has made my life significantly easier and more enjoyable.

    Read moreRead less
